title: MASEMiner — factor loadings & correlations
tagline: Extract item-level factor loadings, inter-factor correlations, and study metadata for a target scale (MASEM, indirect)
description: MASEMiner — factor-loadings variant.  Extracts item-level factor loadings and inter-factor correlations (plus study/sample metadata) for a psychometric scale across primary factor-analytic studies.  Generic across scales — name your scale and items in the prompt; the sibling variant extracts pairwise effect sizes instead.
task_description: Extract factor-analytic data — item-level factor loadings, inter-factor correlations, and study/sample metadata — for the target scale, for every sample reported in the paper.
context: Papers report factor-analytic / psychometric studies (EFA/CFA) of a target scale: item-level loadings and inter-factor correlations across one or more samples.
